sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after to see what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Get segmentation for both
before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

print("=== BEFORE ===")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'B', 'c']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\n=== AFTER ===")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'B', 'c']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Also check ascii diff in the key region
before_lines = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== ASCII DIFF (rows 29-34, cols 10-50) ===")
for i in range(29, 35):
    b = before_lines[i][10:50]
    a = after_lines[i][10:50]
    if b != a:
        print(f"Row {i}: BEFORE: {b}")
        print(f"Row {i}: AFTER:  {a}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Now I see what happened:
1. The left green box (N with W center) moved RIGHT by 3 cells - from cols 18-20 to cols 21-23
2. The bottom bar changed - it lost one charcoal pixel (64→63) and gained a white pixel at the end

The right green box (N with B center) stayed at cols 27-29. Wait, actually looking more carefully:
- Before: id=6 (N, cols 18-20, W center at 19), id=7 (N, cols 27-29, B center at 28)
- After: id=6 (N, cols 21-23, W center at 22), id=8 (N, cols 27-29, B center at 28)
The left green box moved right by 3 cells. The right green box didn't move.
So the W-centered green box is the player. The B-centered green box is probably a target or obstacle. The charcoal boxes might be goals or obstacles too.
Let me think about the goal. The purple bar is at cols 33-37. The player is now at cols 21-23. The target (B-centered box) is at cols 27-29.

- After row 30:  `wwwwwwwwwNNNwwwNNNwww`
The left NNN moved from position ~18-20 to ~21-23 (3 cells right). The right NNN stayed at 27-29.
So the player (W-centered green box) moved right by 3 cells. Let me continue moving to see if I can reach the target or interact with the charcoal boxes.
